regions: United States, Canada and Latin America
Combined Europe, Asia and other markets

dependencies: Export controls and trade restrictions on rare earth materials from China
Dependence on magnets integral to various assemblies used in products
Supply constraints on raw materials and electronic components including semiconductor chips and magnets
risks: Disruptions in supply of components from suppliers could result in significant reduction in sales and profitability
Export controls and trade restrictions on rare earth materials from China could limit availability and increase cost of key inputs
China's Ministry of Commerce license requirements and volume caps on rare earth materials and magnet products
Geopolitical tensions, retaliatory tariffs or logistics disruptions may result in supply shortages or sharp price increases
Prolonged or repeated interruptions could lead to accelerated capital expenditures on supply-chain diversification
Substantial increases in product demand have resulted in higher costs for materials and components
Increased expenditures for freight and other expenses negatively impact profit margins
Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act (UFLPA) restrictions on goods from Xinjiang Uyghur Administrative Region of China
Military conflict between Russia and Ukraine has caused significant volatility and disruptions globally
Conflict between Israel and Iran may lead to fluctuations in oil prices and global economic instability

regulatory_risks: FDA regulations and Quality System Regulation (QSR) / Quality Management System Regulation (QMSR) compliance
European Medical Device Regulation (MDR) compliance and CE marking requirements
Medical Device Single Audit Program (MDSAP) requirements across multiple jurisdictions
Therapeutic Goods Administration (Australia), Health Canada, CFDA (China) registration requirements
Federal Anti-Kickback Statute compliance
Federal civil and criminal False Claims Act
Federal Civil Monetary Penalties Law beneficiary inducement prohibition
Federal Physician Self-Referral Law (Stark Law)
Federal Physician Payments Sunshine Act reporting requirements
HIPAA Privacy, Security and Breach Notification Rules compliance
State anti-kickback and false claims laws
State laws requiring reporting of payments to healthcare providers
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) compliance
Foreign bribery and anti-corruption laws
GDPR (EU and UK) data protection requirements
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA)
State comprehensive data protection laws (over one-third of U.S. states)
State biometric data regulation laws
EU AI Act (Regulation 2024/1689) requirements
State AI laws including Colorado AI Act
Telephone Consumer Protection Act restrictions
Medicare DMEPOS Competitive Bidding Program
Medicare Sequestration Payment Reductions (2% reduction)
Physician Fee Schedule conversion factor reductions
VA disability ratings criteria changes for sleep apnea
Medicaid funding cuts and eligibility requirement changes under One Big Beautiful Bill Act
ACA changes including shortened enrollment periods and elimination of automatic re-enrollment
CMS national coverage determination for respiratory assist devices and mechanical ventilators
Off-label marketing restrictions
510(k) premarket notification clearance process changes
Premarket approval (PMA) requirements for high-risk devices
Medical Device Reporting (MDR) requirements
EU Medical Device Vigilance System and Field Safety Corrective Actions (FSCAs)
Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (TCJA) provisions including GILTI tax
IRC Section 174 capitalization of R&D expenditures
OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax initiative
Inflation Reduction Act 15% corporate minimum tax
Environmental Management System (EMS) ISO 14001:2015 certification
Climate change reporting and sustainability disclosure requirements
Trade policy changes including tariff measures and reciprocal tariffs

sanction_risks: U.S. sanctions against Russia due to military conflict with Ukraine
Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act (UFLPA) restrictions on goods from Xinjiang region of China
Potential sanctions related to conflict between Israel and Iran
Export controls on rare earth materials from China
Reciprocal tariffs imposed by U.S. and retaliatory measures by other countries
Trade restrictions and tariff measures introduced in February 2025
